summary: Payroll Preview UI/UX Changes - All features tested and verified working. Backend: 5/5 tests passed. Frontend UI: All features validated through Playwright.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

working_days_editable_in_header.details: Working Days input with data-testid='batch-working-days-input' is displayed in header, not as table column. Changing it triggers recalculation for entire batch.

absent_days_column_renamed_and_editable.details: Column renamed to 'Absent Days (Editable)'. Input fields have data-testid='absent-days-{employee_id}'. Formula: Present Days = Working Days - Absent Days.

absent_days_validation_non_negative.details: Entering negative value (-1) shows error 'Must be >= 0' with red border and error message.

absent_days_validation_max_working_days.details: Entering value exceeding working days (25 when working=22) shows error 'Cannot exceed 22 working days'.

realtime_recalculation.details: Changing Absent Days triggers immediate recalculation of Attendance Deduction, Net Salary, and batch totals.

other_deductions_editable.details: Other column is editable with input fields (data-testid='other-deductions-{employee_id}'). Plain numeric input.

net_salary_formula.details: Net = Gross - Statutory - (Absent_Days/Working_Days * Gross) - Other. Recalculated in real-time.

create_batch_button_works.details: Create Batch button (data-testid='create-batch-btn') is enabled when no validation errors. Disabled when errors exist.

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test batch for June/July 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll Preview UI/UX changes verified: 1) Working Days is now editable in header (not table column), 2) 'Absent Days' column (renamed from Attendance Days) is editable with validation, 3) Formula: Present = Working - Absent, 4) Real-time recalculation works, 5) 'Other' deductions column is editable, 6) Create Batch works after edits. All data-testid attributes present and working.
